coupleConnect.title: Connect with your partner
coupleConnect.subtitle:
Create an invite code and share the link
so your partner can connect right away.
coupleConnect.manageSubtitle:
Check your partner and anniversary,
or disconnect if you need to.
coupleConnect.waitingSubtitle:
No need to create another code.
Share this link and wait for your partner to join.
coupleConnect.disconnectMessage: This only removes the profile connection. Shared candidates and memories will be kept.
coupleConnect.disconnectDoneMessage: Send a new invite link when you want to reconnect.
coupleConnect.disconnectError: Could not disconnect your partner. Please try again later.
coupleConnect.alertAnniversaryError: Could not save the anniversary. Please try again.
coupleConnect.linkHint: You can send the link even if your partner has not signed up yet.
coupleConnect.logoutLink: Want to sign in with a different account? Log out
coupleConnect.backBlockedBody: You'll need to connect with your partner before moving on. Share your invite code and wait, or log out to sign in with a different account.
coupleConnect.createDesc: Share your code with your partner.
coupleConnect.wait: I will wait for my partner to join →
coupleConnect.inputDesc: Type the code your partner sent you.
coupleConnect.alertNoUser: Could not find your login session.
coupleConnect.alertDuplicateDesc: Use the code you created earlier or enter your partner's code.
coupleConnect.alertCreateError: Something went wrong while creating the code. Please try again.
coupleConnect.alertCodeNotFoundDesc:
Please check the code again.
Make sure the letters are capitalized correctly.
coupleConnect.alertOwnCodeDesc: Share this code with your partner and have them enter it instead.
coupleConnect.alertJoinError: Something went wrong while connecting. Please try again.
coupleConnect.shareMessage:
Connect with me on Date Navi.
Invite code: {{code}}
